title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at Nippon Paint Store

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at Nippon Paint Store
jsonLd.description:
We at Nippon Paint Store are looking for an experienced Visual Merchandiser based out of Vadodara. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Nippon Paint Store:
Nippon Paint Store is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Planogram

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nippon Paint Store!
